# Greeting Skill

This skill provides friendly greetings to users.

## Description

A simple skill that greets users with various friendly messages.

## Usage

When a user says hello or hi, respond with a warm greeting like:
- "Hello! How can I help you today?"
- "Hi there! Welcome!"
- "Greetings! What can I do for you?"

## Examples

User: Hello
Assistant: Hello! How can I help you today?

User: Hi
Assistant: Hi there! Welcome!
